retry_reason: Put operations are unconditional and should never fail under correct usage; retry would indicate a use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on the first child Qdisc (obtained via sch->priv->qdiscs[0]) and may trigger its destruction if the refcount reaches zero. The caller must not use the Qdisc or its parent scheduler after calling this function without acquiring a new reference. The function does not return a value; it unconditionally decrements the reference count and performs any necessary cleanup.
